title: Immersive Healing
description: Immersive Healing Mod revamps Minecraft’s healing system with realistic mechanics. Craft bandages, pills, and first aid kits, grow herbs, and progress from basic remedies to advanced medical supplies, all with time-based healing and side effects.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7cff3f3aa10c4ee38084ee5a981da5077e7ca8.png)

Immersive Healing Mod revamps Minecraft’s healing system with realistic mechanics. Craft bandages, pills, and first aid kits, grow herbs, and progress from basic remedies to advanced medical supplies, all with time-based healing and side effects.

Find the new Medica Herb and craft brand new items which can heal or  help you in hard situations.

![Medica Herb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a920abd007b41ae58fa2dbf2062d0f2254a5f4c.png)
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72d890c90c7dd229b3e42f74be162b37e2dbc61.png)
